form.layout: ==========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[单号] projectId[项目] orgId[业务组织] customerId[客户] businessDate[结算日期] settlementType[结算类型] docStatus[单据状态] approveStatus[审核状态] pnlSnapshotId[关联损益汇总] ==========>amount[金额信息]====== currencyId[币种] exchangeRate[汇率] amountSource[源币种金额] amountFunctional[本位币金额] finalRevenue[最终结算收入] finalCost[最终结算成本] finalProfit[最终损益] ==========^retention[保留款信息]========= retentionAmount[质保金/保留款] retentionDueDate[质保金到期] transferToAsset[是否转固定资产] assetCardId[转固资产卡片] settlementVoucherCode[结算凭证号] ==========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

==========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[单号] projectId[项目] orgId[业务组织] customerId[客户] businessDate[结算日期] settlementType[结算类型] docStatus[单据状态] approveStatus[审核状态] pnlSnapshotId[关联损益汇总] ==========>amount[金额信息]====== currencyId[币种] exchangeRate[汇率] amountSource[源币种金额] amountFunctional[本位币金额] finalRevenue[最终结算收入] finalCost[最终结算成本] finalProfit[最终损益] ==========>retention[保留款信息]====== retentionAmount[质保金/保留款] retentionDueDate[质保金到期] transferToAsset[是否转固定资产] assetCardId[转固资产卡片] settlementVoucherCode[结算凭证号] remark[备注](2)

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: code[单号] docStatus[单据状态] projectId[项目] businessDate[结算日期]
